title: Gauntlet lens registry entry
description: One diagnostic capability in the gauntlet roster. A lens is DISTINCT only when it has a materially different object of scrutiny, evidence signature, causal/failure mechanism, output+falsifier, and selection conditions. Persona flavor is not novelty. Validated by scripts/validate_roster.py (stdlib implementation of this subset — no external jsonschema dependency).

workflow_role.description: Pipeline role. generate_options runs PRE-panel on open questions (its runs never satisfy evaluator-panel diversity); evaluate is the panel seat; gate is a categorical/process check that can block regardless of weighing; adjudicate consumes the record. null only for retired entries.

final_judge.description: adjudicate-role only: whether this card may hold the final judge seat (pragmatic-judge default; bayesian-adjudicator conditional alternate).

primary_capability.description: Controlled capability-family vocabulary; panel diversity constraints count distinct families.

object_of_scrutiny.description: EXCLUSIVE object this lens inspects. Two available lenses sharing an object must be merged, mutexed, or boundary-narrowed.

required_evidence.description: Evidence signature: what the lens must be able to obtain to run. Selector gates on availability.

causal_mechanism.description: The failure/causal mechanism this lens detects — the WHY behind its findings.

falsifier_template.description: Observable falsifier shape: method + threshold + timeframe. Structurally observable, not merely a non-empty string.

boundary.description: Explicit non-overlap boundary against this neighbor.

mutex_group.description: Mutual-exclusion/counter-mode group: peers may not both be selected unless an intentional contrast is recorded, and then count as ONE diversity unit.

superseded_by.description: Required when status=retired. Retired IDs are never deleted — historical runs replay by ID+version.

card.description: The {{PERSONA_SPEC}} body. Preserved verbatim on retired entries for replay.
